Leash Skills curriculum
Loose-leash walking in the real world
6 weeks · 45 min/session
What's being learned
Loose-leash walking
No pulling, even past other dogs and people
Position resets
Returning to handler's side after distractions
Auto-sit at stops
Sitting automatically when you stop walking
Changing directions
Smooth turns and pace changes on leash
Greeting manners on leash
Calm four-paws-down when meeting others
